entry.title: Re: How to automatically block for payment a document reo...
entry.content: Hello Pmorais1985, Hello, thank you very much for your kindness in helping!

entry.title: New member
entry.content:
Hi

My name is Vítor, I’m from Portugal, and I’m very excited to be part of this space for sharing and professional growth. Over the past few months, I’ve been fully dedicated to completing trainings to consolidate my knowledge and prepare myself.

  • SAP Consultant Career Start: I gained a broad overview of SAP modules, implementation methodologies, and consulting best practices.

  • SAP Financial Consultant: I specialized in financial processes, accounting, and reporting in an SAP environment, with an emphasis on FI-CO integration.

I would love to hear your thoughts on the best paths to start working with SAP.

  • Which resources (blogs, videos, advanced courses) do you recommend for deepening skills?

  • How can I gain practical experience while looking for my first opportunity (e.g., personal projects, volunteering, internships)?

I’d appreciate your suggestions, career-transition stories, and practical advice to help me take my first steps.

Thank you for your help

Vitor

entry.title: Error: "View XYZ can't be assigned since no restriction could be determined"
entry.content:
A Business Role has been configured however, users assigned to this role do not see the requested work center view.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Error: "View XYZ can't be assigned since no restricti...
entry.content:
The restriction rule is based on the user's organizational unit assignment. Depending on the selected restriction rules, the system verifies whether the assigned organization is designated as a Sales or Service Organization.

If the flag is missing, the work center view will not be assigned to the user. Therefore, it is important to ensure that the Business User is assigned to a valid organizational unit.

entry.title: Re: Is there a Fiori app to read the data's invoice from...
entry.content:
Hi @victorpale ,

As of today there is no standard fiori app but you can have look at the below workaround

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-members/qr-code-scanner-in-fiori/ba-p/13382677

This is a blog written by a former member on how to Implement QR Code Scanner in Fiori as a browser based app, this might help with your usecase.

 If you find anything better do let us know!

Regards,

Rithika

entry.title: Re: How to automatically block for payment a document reo...
entry.content: Hello Henk Hoogerbrug, thank you very much for your kindness in helping!

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite OData V4 receiving format JSON
entry.content: SAP S4 APIs support json, but the OData Adapter in CI don't. That's why you can post from postman, but not through CI. I believe you could change your adapter from Odata to REST then json should work, but of course you would lose the functionalities of odata channel

entry.title: Re: How to identify Login user as Manager in Add new Empl...
entry.content:
Hello @karthik1gobburu 

If Position Management is activated, then go with below solution:

This logic will produce the desired result.

 

KR😊

Mrutyunjay Kumar

entry.title: How to include Segment in an organisation-type public dimension hierarchy in SAC with standard API?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am working on building a public dimension of type Organisation in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) to represent an organisational hierarchy.
The hierarchy should reflect the following structure:

Segment → Profit Center Groups → Profit Centers → Cost Centers

So far, I have been using standard SAP APIs to bring the data for Profit Centers and Cost Centers successfully. However, I am facing challenges including the Segment level in the hierarchy.

The Segment field exists in the query behind Profit Centers, but it does not appear or cannot be linked correctly in the public dimension.

My setup uses an import connection to SAC, and the public dimension is based on these standard APIs.

My questions are:

  1. Is it possible to include Segment as a level above Profit Center Groups in a public dimension of type Organisation in SAC?
  2. If yes, how can I properly configure the hierarchy to include Segment?
  3. Are there any recommended SAP APIs or CDS views that support this Segment → Profit Center Groups → Profit Centers → Cost Centers hierarchy out of the box?
  4. If this is not possible directly, what would be the best practice to model this hierarchy with Segment included? Should I create a custom model or custom hierarchy in SAC?

Any guidance, example configurations, or pointers to SAP documentation would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you in advance for your support.

#SAPAnalyticsCloud #PublicDimension #OrganisationHierarchy #Segment #ProfitCenter #CostCenter #SAPAPIs

entry.title: Re: How to automatically block for payment a document reo...
entry.content: Have you thought about using BTEs like 00001040 or 00001041 to trigger an update these uncleared items at a later stage?

entry.title: Picture image - reference one of three image by name to change image shown
entry.content:
I am using Crystal Reports 2020 SP4 (14.3.4.4773), my question is: Can you load three different images and reference one of the three in a fourth image to change what is shown for the fourth image?
E.g. Stop light images (red, yellow, green), change a fourth image to red by referencing the name (all images in the same section of report design). Is this possible? The idea is to have the images I need already imported onto the section I need them and reference them instead of having a dynamic link to a network location in order to swap images as the report PDF is being generated.

entry.title: Re: Internal Server Error occurred when trying to log in to Hana cockpit in web browser
entry.content:
Hi @aprao 

I had the same issue, followed the blog and fixed my issue.

Thanks

entry.title: Is there a way to automatically run the query in SAP DSP via python?
entry.content:
Is there a way to automatically run the query in SAP DSP via python and create an export file on users machine

 

Thanks

entry.title: Sapphire 2025 guide to sessions and resources on AI in SAP BTP
entry.content:
As you prepare to attend Sapphire 2025, we invite you to explore the exciting world of AI within SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP).  

Whether you want to infuse AI into your applications and drive innovation, develop applications more productively with Joule or build custom skills and agents with Joule Studio, here are some resources that will empower you in your journey 

New AI offerings in SAP Build: Read about the AI capabilities available to SAP Build and ABAP developers 

  • AI in SAP BTP: Explore all AI offerings available on SAP BTP 
  • Joule for developers: Unlock new levels of productivity with AI in SAP Build 
  • Joule for developers: Joule speaks ABAP! 
  • Joule for developers: Enable Joule in SAP Build Process Automation & SAP Build Apps 
  • Joule for developers: Frequently asked questions 
  • Whitepaper: ABAP Development in the age of AI 
  • Video- AI in Enterprise Automation - https://dam.sap.com/mac/u/a/mwr9wEr?rc=10&doi=SAP1190165 
  • Video- AI in Integration Suite - https://dam.sap.com/mac/u/a/wXfj279?rc=10&doi=SAP1182603 

BTP Interactive learning tools: Get guidance with available SAP resources covering aspects like application development, integration, data analytics, and AI 

  • Joule for developers, ABAP AI capabilities: Take a product tour 
  • Build Code Test Drive: Experiment without risks  
  • Code Samples: Generative AI hub starter kit  
  • Reference architecture: Optimal setup guides  
  • Step-by-Step Guidance: Detailed implementation instructions on SAP Discovery Center  

Knowledge Building Tools: Collaborate and learn how to use Business AI to implement use cases with certification programs and hands-on developer tutorials 

  • Tutorials: Prompt LLMs in the generative AI hub in SAP AI Core & Launchpad | SAP Tutorials  
  • Certification Programs: Recognized learning paths for Business AI , SAP Certified Associate - SAP Generative AI Developer 
  • Developer Videos: Hands-on videos on BTP use cases with AI  
  • Community: Be part of our new public group for AI enthusiasts  

Expert Assistance: Find experts to support your BTP AI journey 

  • SAP Certified Partners: Find SAP Partners  
  • Tailored SAP Support: SAP Support Portal  

While Sapphire Orlando has over 700 sessions and small events to choose from, we are also excited to share some sessions at Sapphire that showcase the value of AI for developers and practitioners from the SAP 2025 session catalog. To get started we recommend the following sessions that showcase new AI capabilities in SAP Build, ABAP and Integration suite in SAP BTP.  

AI sessions in BTP: 

Session 

Date and Time 

Location 

AI in SAP BTP: What’s new and what’s next - BTP1584  

 

Option1: May 20th, 11:00 am to 11:20 am  

Option 2: May 21st, 2:00 pm to 2:30 pm 

Option 1: Theater 22 

Option 2: Theater 24 

Joule Studio in action: Create AI agents and skills for business workflows - BTP2889 

May 20th, 11:30 am to 11:50 am 

Theater 26 

Building smarter AI agents with Joule Studio - BTP2677 

May 21st, 11:00 am to 11:20 am 

Theater 22 

Joule for developers: Unlock new potential with AI for SAP Build - BTP1587 

May 20th, 4:00 pm to 4:20 pm 

Theater 22 

Accelerate development and automation with SAP Build - BTP2888 

May 21st, 11:00 am to 11:20 am 

Theater 24 

AI agents with agent builder and runtime on SAP BTP - BTP2574 

May 20th, 3:00 pm to 3:40 pm  

(ASUG) S330D 

Future-proof your integration investment with AI - BTP2121 

May 20th, 4:00 pm to 4:20 pm 

Theater 24 

Now live: Build faster with Joule for developers, ABAP AI capabilities - BTP2179 

May 20th, 3pm to 3:20 pm 

Theater 23 

SAP Build: AI-driven innovation and extensibility for SAP Business Suite - BTP2592 

May 20th, 1:00 pm-1:20 pm 

Theater 24 

Your business, your way: SAP Build extensions, automations, and AI agents - BTP2667 

May 20th, 3:00 pm to 3:40 pm 

(ASUG) S330ABC 

 

SAP’s AI offerings benefit the enterprise. There are plenty of sessions to choose from the Business AI track. Here are some sessions that highlight the value and use cases of custom AI solutions in enterprise management:  

 

Session 

Date and time 

Location 

AI today: Reimagining efficiency with SAP Business AI and Joule Agents - BAI2616 

May 20th, 11:00 am to 11:20 am 

Theater 15 

AI tomorrow: Uncover what’s next with SAP Business AI - BAI2618 

May 21st, 2:30 pm to 2:50 pm 

Theater 15 

Exploring SAP Business AI and its road map - BAI3499 

May 20th , 1:30 am to 11:10 am 

(ASUG) S329 

Best practices for adopting Joule agents: Insights from experts - BAI2601 

May 21st, 2:30 pm to 3:10 pm 

Theater 21 

Generative AI hub: Instant access to top AI - BAI3411 

May 21st, 1:30 pm to 1:50 pm 

Theater 21 

Joule agents in action: Business like never before - BAI2606 

May 21st, 10:30 to 10:50 pm 

Theater 21 

Joule: Unlock the future of productivity - BAI2597 

May 20th, 2:00 pm to 2:20 pm 

Theater 30 

Bringing AI to tabular data with innovative and harmonized services - BAI2626 

May 20th, 4:30 pm to 4:50 pm 

Theater 5 

Responsible AI in action: Building trust and driving innovation - BAI2612 

May 20th, 3:30 pm to 3:50 pm 

Theater 21 

Enhancing SAP software projects with AI-driven guidance and code generation - BAI3412 

May 20th, 4:30 pm to 4:50 pm 

Theater 23 

Discover recent and upcoming AI innovations for your business functions - BAI3956 

May 20th, 3:00 pm to 3:40 pm  

(ASUG) S329 

  

Aside from these, Sapphire 2025 has a roster of sessions showcasing customer and partner success stories about their implementation journey with AI.  

Customer and partner success stories at Sapphire:  

 

Session 

Date and Time 

Location 

Customer spotlight: AI-enhanced design manufacturing - BTP3576 

May 21st, 2:00 pm to 2:20 pm 

Theater 22 

Customer spotlight: AI-enhanced plant maintenance - BTP3037 

May 21st, 2:30 pm to 2:50 pm 

Theater 22 

Joule and Microsoft 365 Copilot: AI-enabled productivity in action - BAI2594 

May 20th, 11:30 am to 11:50 pm 

Theater 21 

Hitachi High-Tech: Innovating and extending with SAP Build and advanced AI - BTP2588 

May 20th , 11:00 am to 11:20 pm 

Theater 24 

Innovation in process automation with generative AI - BTP2589 

May 21st, 10:30 am to 10:50 am 

Theater 23 

Building a generative AI road map and path to deployment at HP - BTP1680 

May 21st, 10:30 am to 11:10 am 

(ASUG) S330D 

AI-powered insights: How HPE and Deloitte transformed executive reporting - PAR1128 

May 20th, 4:00 pm to 4:20 pm 

Theater 17 

AI-first approach at Eaton - PAR1146 

May 21st, 1:30 pm to 1:50 pm 

Theater 1 

Joule: Smarter workflows, faster decisions, greater impact - BAI3416 

May 21st, 2 pm to 2:20 pm 

Theater 14 

Agentic ERP: Migrating to SAP S/4HANA and agentic operations at UiPath - PAR1199 

May 20th, 2:30 pm to 2:50 pm 

Theater 17 

The brands building the future with AI and agents - BAI2617 

May 20th, 1:00 pm to 1:40 pm 

Theater 21 

Enhancing employee experience with Joule and AI - BAI2605 

May 20th, 11:30 am to 11:50 am 

Theater 20 

 

From these sessions and resources, you will get insights into how SAP’s AI solutions can enhance and improve processes, support individuals to help them work efficiently, and manage processes and tasks with powerful technology platforms. Apart from these, there are many additional sessions in the session catalog that you can explore. 

If you are visiting Sapphire, Orlando in person, and want to learn about AI in SAP BTP, our team would be excited to see you at our booth: BTP 160- AI for developers in the Platform area on the show floor.

entry.title: Re: How do I select which ID origin personalizes a conten...
entry.content:
Hi Jan,

Thank you for the solution. I will need to connect with my developer on implementing the solution.

Regarding your question, here is a screen grab showing BuPa IDs for the same contact: 
The only difference between the two profiles is that one has a value under the telephone number and the other profile doesn't. 
Thank you,
Daniella

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA 2023 Fully-Activated Appliance: Known Issues
entry.content:
@Al_Nichols , you would need to apply a maintenance certificate (valid for 3 months respectively) using the standard system registration and license pages. 
If you have further detailed questions, it's easier if you post a question in https://community.sap.com/t5/c-khhcw49343/SAP+Cloud+Appliance+Library/pd-p/67837800100800004473 (use board Technology Q&A, tag SAP Cloud Appliance Library). 
Best, Joerg

entry.title: Mitigating OWASP and Other API Security Threats with SAP Integration Suite, API Management
entry.content:
Hello everybody,

APIs power seamless integration and driving innovative, AI-driven workflows. Unfortunately, this role also casts APIs as prime targets for a growing number of security threats. For API administrators, understanding and effectively mitigating these risks is paramount, and this topic regularly comes up in conversations with our customers.

That's why I'm thrilled to announce our new security guide: "Mitigating OWASP and other API Security Threats with SAP Integration Suite, API Management."

This 30-page guide is specifically designed for API Administrators with a working knowledge of security principles and who would like to leverage the power of SAP Integration Suite, API Management.

Why is this guide relevant to you?

As organizations increasingly rely on APIs, the API Management capability within SAP Integration Suite emerges as a critical shield, offering tools and techniques to govern, monitor, and crucially, secure your API ecosystem. This guide dives deep into how you can harness the built-in policies of API Management to effectively address prevalent security threats.

Inside this guide, you'll discover strategies to mitigate:

  • Lack of Security Awareness: Understand the critical API risks and how API Management best practices can enhance your security posture.
  • Forbidden Traffic: Learn how to prevent unwanted access and resource consumption using API Management policies.
  • Unauthorized Access: Explore robust techniques for authentication and authorization to ensure only legitimate entities can access your APIs.
  • Input Attacks: Discover how to leverage API Management to defend against injections, cross-site scripting, and other malicious input manipulations.
  • Data Exposure: Implement measures within API Management to prevent the leakage of sensitive information.

We closely align with the renowned OWASP Top 10 API and other significant security risks, providing practical guidance on how to apply API Management policies to counter these threats. While OWASP offers a valuable framework, this guide also emphasizes a broader perspective on essential security principles.

Here's a peek at the table of contents:

  1. Introduction
  2. The role of API Management
  3. Lack of security awareness
    • OWASP-8: Security Misconfiguration
    • OWASP-9 Improper Inventory Management
    • Insufficient Logging & Monitoring (OWASP-10 2019)
  4. Forbidden traffic
    • OWASP-4 Unrestricted Resource consumption
    • Man-in-the-middle
    • OWASP-6 Unrestricted Access, e.g., with forbidden origin
  5. Unauthorized Access
    • OWASP-2: Broken Authentication
    • OWASP-1: Broken Object Level Authorization
    • OWASP-5: Broken Function Level Authorization
  6. Input attacks
    • Injections (OWASP-8 2019)
    • Remote File Inclusion (RFI)
    • Mass Assignment (OWASP-6 2019)
    • Web policy violation
    • Cross-Site request Forgery (CSRF)
    • Cross-Site Scripting (XSS)
    • OWASP-7: Server-side request forgery (SSRF)
  7. Data Exposure
    • Sensitive Data Exposure (OWASP-3 2019)
    • Excessive Data exposure (OData $batch)
  8. Appendix: Sample OAS validation policy

We provide a structured approach to identifying relevant security risks and offer actionable insights into leveraging the built-in security policies of SAP Integration Suite, API Management, to mitigate them effectively.

Here is the link to the downloadable guide.

I recommend this guide to all API Administrators working with SAP Integration Suite. By understanding the principles and applying the techniques outlined, you can significantly strengthen your API ecosystem against a wide range of security threats.

Happy reading 😀!
--
Chaim

entry.title: The AI Adoption Journey: Machine Learning- A Deeper Dive!
entry.content:
Hello all!

Last blog, we skimmed over some of the Machine Learning features that SAP Fieldglass has but I’ve since gotten to experiment with it more and I must talk about it!
First things first. Machine Learning is a part of the base AI for Fieldglass, which means its available for anyone that has Fieldglass. It blows my mind that it’s not used more!

So, why would anyone want to use these features? Like the example I gave in the last blog, getting a large influx of resumes from various job postings can be a substantial burden on your administrative team.

How does Resume Assessment work to resolve this? AI assists in identifying the right job seekers by screening submitted candidates in how close of a match they are to the job description.
I remember when I was starting college, the advice was to put all the important information around the middle of the page, where a person’s thumb would be holding it. This was the idea they used to have about “efficiency” when it came to reviewing resumes. I'm sure we've all heard little tips and tricks like that- repurposing keywords in the resumes, placing them somewhere specific on the page, even hacks on fonts to keep the readers eyes on the page! 
Now, we have AI that will comb through the candidate resumes to do a match on both skills and work experience.
Your business has more sway in this process than you might think! Buyers can prioritize the factors differently, depending on industry, job title or level of experience! A new field called Resume Assessment Weighting on the Contingent Type can be leveraged to indicate the level of importance the business deems appropriate.
This field contains four main categories that the buyer can set based on their preference to produce a banded score: Skills, Industry Experience, Work Experience and Qualifications.

The algorithm matches the skills on the resume The algorithm matches the skills listed on the resume against the application's skills library, analyzes the industry experience, work experience, and qualifications based on the preferences set using the Resume Assessment Weighting field, and produces that banded score. This scoring system uses a five-tier band: best, better, good, weak, no match) to indicate compatibility with the job posting description.
So why the banded score? This high-level score can let the administrative team know, immediately, who the most compatible candidates are for the Job Postings.  With this feature in use, businesses saw that 61% of candidates hired were ranked “Best” by resume assessment.
ML doesn’t stop here with the requisition process. There’s also an experience assessment and skills extraction The Experience Assessment will offer a percentile score (1-100%) based on skills and related experience, as well as skills extraction, where AI combs through the submitted resume, and will visually highlight skills and qualifications making them easier to see (freeing up your thumbs and saving paper). This not only speeds up the reviewing, short listing and hiring process. Customers that enabled this feature saw an over all 15% reduction in workers closed with a “do not hire” reason.

These seemingly simple change in automation removes bottlenecks in the process in speeding up review to hire but also cleans up the integrity of the workforce hired overall.

Of course, there is all this information and so much more to play with in an interactive setting on the SAP Fieldglass Product Work Zone. They have an amazing AI Hub that I strongly encourage you to explore: SAP Fieldglass Product Success Work Zone - AI Hub

Also, please check out this great series by Fabian Caelers on Quick Win Features to learn some more valuable tips and tricks to make the most of your solution: SAP Fieldglass - Quick Win Features - Episode 2 - SAP Community

Join me next week, as I get into the obscure gem that is O*NET code recommendations in Fieldglass and why that matters!

entry.title: Re: Test printing for S4HANA Cloud using SAP cloud print manager PI
entry.content:
Is there anything to stop us using the "Save to File" option as our main print file output solution (not just for testing)?  We don't want to print directly to a printer as we have a large print department and want to print from pdf files instead.

Is this the best practice for printing pdfs from S4/Hana Public, or is there a better alternative?

entry.title: Learn how to accelerate your transformation journey with the plug and gain approach
entry.content:
Dear SAP Signavio Community,

We are thrilled to introduce our latest learning opportunity designed exclusively for SAP Enterprise Support customers: the “Expert-Guided Implementation Workshop: SAP Signavio Adoption Starter: Plug and Gain approach - process discovery and analysis” This workshop will revolutionize how you explore and analyze your SAP ERP processes! This dynamic learning session will introduce you to a streamlined methodology for uncovering and understanding your current as-is processes using cutting-edge tools like SAP Signavio Process Insights, Process Intelligence, and Collaboration Hub. Gain the ability to make informed transformation decisions with valuable insights drawn from your existing process landscape. Don’t miss this opportunity to empower your business with enhanced capabilities to drive efficient and strategic changes.

Book your seat today!

How to get in?

Spoiler
If you haven't yet signed up with your S-user for the SAP Enterprise Support Academy and Value Maps, don't worry, we've got you covered! Get started with SAP Enterprise Support Academy and Value Maps here. (Check out our step-by-step instructional video  on how to join SAP Enterprise Support Academy and Value maps.)

Direct registration link:

Expert-Guided Implementation Workshop: SAP Signavio Adoption Starter: Plug and Gain approach - process discovery and analysis

The course schedule:

Wednesday, June 4th - 16:00-18:00 UTC+8 (SGT) | 9:00-11:00 UTC+1 (CET)

Wednesday, June 4th - 10:00-12:00 UTC+5 (EST) | 16:00-18:00 UTC+1 (CET)

 Do you want to stay up to date on further training and enablement offerings?

Remember to subscribe to our monthly SAP Enterprise Support Academy newsletter: Subscribe here

Registration Prerequisites:

  • Participants commit to actively participate in the selected workshop(s) (one day/2hrs each)
  • Participant organization is entitled to use SAP Signavio solutions, as part of a selected RISE with SAP package or through a product subscription plan.

 

Do you need any additional help?

Join the Business Transformation Management value map (remember the grey box above)

Don't hesitate to get in touch with our team using the following form. (Please select the "Business  Transformation Management" topic).

Happy learning!

Best regards,

Petr Venhuda
Global Topic Owner - Business Transformation Management Value Map

entry.title: Re: How to check mandatory fields in RAP
entry.content: I need to have a field mandatory by create and feature : instace for update. If I put both, the field is not marked as mandatory anymore when I create a new entity. And when creating the entity, the code in get_instance_features is not called. How can I have both properties?

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Kyiv
entry.content:
Привіт спільното! Я - Анна Бондаренко, консультант у компанії SAPiens Tech, що спеціалізується на впровадженні рішень SAP — від класичних ERP‑систем до «легших» CRM‑проєктів.

Як і багато мешканців Київщини, у 2022‑му я залишилася вдома. Тож стресостійкість у мене, здається, уже вбудована (як і у багатьох з вас). А ще я майже п’ять років впроваджую SAP CX‑рішення (Sales/Service Cloud).

Дуже хотілося б бачити у спільноті більше обговорення про впровадження менших SAP‑рішень, зокрема напряму CX та BTP. Для малих бізнесів це нерідко здається «дорогою іграшкою», а у великих компаніях проекти як правило закінчуються на ERP, бо туди іде весь бюджет і всі "нерви" клієнта. Навіть RISE‑ліцензії, що "дарують" Sales Cloud у комплекті, поки що не рятують ситуацію. Тож обговорення кейсів допоможе розвінчати типові відмовки щодо SAP CX і знайти рішення, які справді приносять бізнесу користь.

Буду рада спілкуванню й новим знайомствам

entry.title: Re: Maximizing the Power of SAP Community at Product Support
entry.content:
Dear Ervin, 

The linked video in the blog has been set to private again. Please check.

Thx and best regards

Sascha

entry.title: 2025 Sapphire Selfies with Bluebeard
entry.content:
In an effort to not only grow my ego but also show appreciation to those attending Sapphire who take a moment to pose with me for a picture I want to collect all of them here, so please if you take a pic with me post it here as a comment and I will add all the ones I take. I’ll be sure to mention you if we exchange info and then you can reply back with any info about yourself or any additional great pics of us you may have during the week here in Orlando at SAP Sapphire 

You can also share what you are doing at Sapphire and tag others that have a session etc.  I’ll be in the SAP Learning & Certification Lab, or wandering to show floor and streets of Orlando + Epcot so shout out if you see me and let’s get a selfie!

To get us started I have me and Markus Marsch & Timo Schuette.  And I had to throw in Bobblehead Bluebeard...

 

Markus, Timo and Bluebeard selfieBluebeard and Bobblehead Bluebeard

entry.title: Re: Microsoft Outlook and Teams Integration for Interview Scheduling
entry.content:
Hi @mahesh231 
I was able to test the scenario for integration with and without enabling team meeting and the event was created in the outlook calendar in both cases.

entry.title: Change of item category from standard to different item category once PO is created
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

Once a Purchase Order (PO) is created with the item category set as Standard, it is currently possible to update it to a different item category, provided there is no history.

 

We would like to know if it is possible to restrict changes to the item category in this scenario, or if a custom enhancement would be required.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Change of item category from standard to different it...
entry.content:
Hello, 

If you are using transaction ME22N, you can change the field selection settings as explained in this document. However, if you are using the Manage Purchase Orders app, you can also implement BAdI MM_PUR_S4_PO_FLDCNTRL_SIMPLE to control the field selection according to your business requirement. 

Best regards, 
Tatiana

entry.title: Re: Integrating SAP Analytics Cloud with SAP Cloud Identity Access Governance
entry.content:
Hi, the rep. sync did pull the roles from SAC to IAG. 

Regards

Plaban

entry.title: Re: 2025 Sapphire Selfies with Bluebeard
entry.content: I will make it a point to stop by. 🙂

entry.title: Re: SAP IAG intergration with SAP Analytical cloud (SAC)
entry.content:
Hi JP,

does rep sync pull also roles from SAC into IAG

Regards

Plaban

entry.title: How to find the change log for Business Partner Master data ?
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

We require the change log for Business Partners from April to March. Change log should have all the fields that were changed during this period for example Bank Account number , Address etc.

Please let us know how to get the Change log for SAP Public Cloud.

 

 

 

Thanks and Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to find the change log for Business Partner Maste...
entry.content:
Change logs for the Business Partner can be found using the below steps:

  1. Open the 'Maintain Business Partner' App.
  2. Search for the Business Partner ID and display it.
  3. Click on 'More' dropdown.
  4. Click on Extras-> Change History-> For this Partner.
  5. Select the fields to view the change history, then select Continue.
  6. Select the Export and choose Spreadsheet.

In the downloaded excel, able to see the change logs of the Business Partner master data.

Note:

The change logs do not record everything for reasons of performance. An example of this is that for the majority of fields change types Insert are not recorded. The change tables would be excessive and as such would create performance issues on the system.

Kindly refer this KBA: How to find the change log for Business Partner Master data ?

entry.title: Re: Price Settings in CPQ – BRIM S/4 Solution Quotation Integration
entry.content:
Hello @Urmil_Apte 

We are using the VCPS (Variant Pricing and Configurations Service) integrations with the document pricing model in SAP CPQ. 

The problem is that whenever we are trying to add the discount at the line item level the manual condition update call is not happening from CPQ to CPS. Its stick with the same pricing values, this mean there is no http request to CPS for updating the document with the manual discount condition.

But where as whenever we are updating the quantity the call to CPS is happening, I am wondering whether is there any particular configuration which we are missing?

Could you please help us on this..?

Thanks

Mohanraj C

entry.title: FI postings with Statistical WBS and Cross company cost center is not allowing
entry.content:
Our Business is currently on S/4 HANA On-Premise and is moving their subsidiary with multiple company codes to S4H Cloud Public Edition. In On-Prem for the business transactions single statistical(S) WBS element is being used across the company codes as Company Code is not mandatory for statistical WBS.

In Public Cloud as the Responsible Cost center is mandatory input for Project/Project element which in turn derives the Company code for Project/WBS element as a standard behavior and is allowing postings to the respective company code and related cost center only.Business concern is this limitation in cloud will increase the statistical projects master Data volume exponentially for multiple company codes and also involve data maintenance.

System does not allow the cross company postings with statistical WBS of Company A to Cost Center belonging to Company B and gives below error message:

KI302 : "CO account Assignment object CTR XXXXX belongs to company code XXXX, not XXXX"

Is it possible to convert the error message to a warning for final postings with configuration or development change request?

Best Regards,

Sumanth

entry.title: Re: 2025 Sapphire Selfies with Bluebeard
entry.content: Experience Center staff selfie

entry.title: Re: 2025 Sapphire Selfies with Bluebeard

entry.title: Re: 2025 Sapphire Selfies with Bluebeard
entry.content: I’m presenting with @DanielleLarocca  on Wednesday but went ahead and grabbed a pic now as Florian Heretsch was passing by.

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports 2020 - Drawing Object Fill Color missing
entry.content: Returning back to this issue. I've set both Options above to "checked" and the result is the same, no dynamic color assignments.

entry.title: Re: Statistical WBS with Cross company cost center is not...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

You're absolutely right to be concerned this is a common issue when moving from S/4HANA On-Premise to Public Cloud.

In the On-Premise world, you had a lot more flexibility. For example, using a single statistical WBS element across multiple company codes worked fine because the system didn’t enforce company code checks for statistical objects.

In S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, SAP has tightened the rules to make everything more consistent and secure across the board.

One of those rules is that all controlling objects (like cost centers and WBS elements) need to belong to the same company code. That’s why you're getting the KI302 error.

And unfortunately, in Public Cloud, you can’t just change this error to a warning like you might have done in On-Prem with message control (transaction OBA5). SAP doesn’t allow that kind of modification in the cloud, and there’s no workaround through development either. It's simply not something customers can override in this environment.

I hope this answers your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Statistical WBS with Cross company cost center is not...

rgds

sar

entry.title: Re: Azure BLOB as RISE DMS
entry.content:
Hi Rgds,

If you are willing to not use SAP LMS store (adapter) with Azure the other option is :

Integration with SharePoint:
SAP provides mechanisms to configure Microsoft SharePoint as a content repository using the ArchiveLink interface. This setup allows for the storage of archived documents and attachments directly within SharePoint. For instance, CaRD offers an ArchiveLink interface that connects SAP systems with SharePoint, enabling it to function as a content server for SAP. This integration is compatible with S/4HANA and supports various attachment types across different SAP interfaces.

YAC stands for universal Attachments Connector and is an SAP add-on that facilitates the integration of attachments and documents from SAP ERP and S/4HANA systems with various Document Management Systems (DMS) both in the cloud and on-premises
Please check the Blog for further info.

Thanks,

Amin

entry.title: Re: HR & Learning UI cards issue in SuccessFactors Work Zone
entry.content: This issue was due to a separate tile using the same sematic object & action. It's resolved!

entry.title: Re: I created a new MM pricing condition that affects PB0...
entry.content: Thank you Kasdna, let me explore this options you present.

entry.title: Enable Key Transmission from Local Directory in SFTP Adapter
entry.content:
While configuring SFTP adapter channels, users are unable to reference private key files stored in a local directory on the file system for authentication. Currently, the adapter only supports uploading keys via the NWA, which limits flexibility in key management.

This enhancement allows the SFTP adapter channel to reference private key files stored in a local directory on the PO server (e.g., LocalDir/PO/keys/) offering greater flexibility in key management.

To enable this feature, two new advanced mode parameters have been introduced:

useLocalPrivateKey (default: false)
When set to true, the adapter will read the private key file from a local directory specified by the openSshKeyPath parameter.

openSshKeyPath (default: null)
Specifies the file path to the OpenSSH private key. This parameter is required only when useLocalPrivateKey is set to true.

At runtime, if ‘useLocalPrivateKey’ is set to true and ‘openSshKeyPath’ is configured:

   - Adapter attempts to read key from local file path.

   - Ensures key is PEM formatted, readable, and secure.

   - Logs error and aborts if file does not exist, permissions are insecure, or key parsing fails.

If ‘openSshKeyPath’ is not set, falls back to NWA-uploaded key. 

Existing channels using NWA-uploaded keys will continue to work unchanged. New functionality is opt-in via configuration.

For SP/patch level details following SAP Note can be referred: 3607095 - Enable Key Transmission from Local Directory in SFTP Adapter

entry.title: Re: DELETE option is not there to delete an employee unde...

entry.title: Re: 2025 Sapphire Selfies with Bluebeard

entry.title: Re: Everything about using SAP Business Transformation center for SDT S/4 HANA Conversion 2023 from
entry.content:
hi @rhea9706 

from technical point of view there is no difference, the approach is the same: a selective data transfer on table level that allows to take over part of your historical data only. 

When product was released there was only the capability to leave behind unused company codes therefore we went live with Lean SDT. Meanwhile we allow the data footprint reduction by time-slice, meaning leaving behind fiscal years as well. 

Further this year, we will release transformation capabilities along such as chart of accounts conversion as well as changing from an account-based approach to a ledger-based approach for parallel accounting. 

The major differentiator is, that Lean SDT by SAP Business Transformation Center is a standard product from SAP, available for all customers and partners hosted on SAP Cloud ALM and included in SAP cloud service subscriptions, SAP Enterprise Support and RISE with SAP. What you refer to as "traditional SDT" are service solutions and scenarios provided by SAP services or expert partners. 

Please find the official roadmap here: https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?SC=252EF753CFDE1EEDA4CFE9C9FEE6AA55&range=FIRST-LAST#Q4%202024

And link to the official documentation: https://help.sap.com/docs/btc

Our community page: https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/data-transition-transformation & latest blogs: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-business-transformation-center-is-now-part-of-the-integrated-toolchain/ba-p/14075484 & https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/streamline-data-migration-from-sap-ecc-to-sap-s-4hana-selective-data/ba-p/14018508

entry.title: Profit Center Assignment in Customer/Supplier in SAP S/4HANA CLOUD PUBLIC EDITION
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have a business requirement where one Supplier or Customer may be debited or credited directly, and the corresponding entry is posted to another Supplier or Customer.

Currently, the "Post General Journal Entries" app does not support the selection of Customer or Supplier accounts, which limits our ability to post these transactions directly through journal entries.

As a workaround, we are using the "Clear Incoming Payment" and "Clear Outgoing Payment" applications to perform these transactions. However, in these apps, we are unable to assign a Profit Center, which is essential for our internal reporting and profitability analysis.

We would appreciate your guidance on the following points

  1. Is there any way to allow Customer and Supplier accounts to be posted together using a journal entry app?

  2. How can we assign Profit Centers in these clearing scenarios, or is there an alternative recommended approach?

We look forward to your suggestions.

Regards,

Prince Ebi

entry.title: About 1-5 times per week our HA SQLA 17 database will begin pausing
entry.content:
About 1-5 times per week our HA SQLA 17 database will begin pausing, along with the server message:  "Database "OurDatabase" mirroring:  Warning: Mirror is running behind the primary server by more than 60 seconds" .  We understand what is happening here, and by examining translated log files we have resolved a number of the offending processes. For the most part, this happens when some process is UPDATEing or DELETEing 10's of thousands or 100's of thousands of rows; the mirror has to execute those statements row by row and can't keep up.  

We understand that changing the mirror "Lagtime" option to a higher value than the default 60 seconds can mask the underlying problem and reduce the frequency of the database pausing.  We'd really prefer to resolve the underlying issues, however.

The problem is that while we have found and fixed many smoking guns causing the pausing, in other cases an examination of the translated log files shows modest or even light activity in the minutes preceding the database pausing.  To our way of thinking, we should not be hitting the lagtime with such light activity.  Has anyone researched similar issues  on their systems and found explanations for "hitting the lagtime and pausing even though the logfile shows light activity"?

Note: we have also done the due diligence to convince ourselves that the inability for the mirror to keep up in these cases is not due to server or networking issues.

entry.title: Re: Deploying App into SAP Build Work Zone / Fiori Launchpad in BTP
entry.content: Today we need to use SAP Build Code. Could you please create an updated blog post to show how to setup BAS and deploy Fiori apps in SAP Build Workzone, after run SAP Build Apps Booster? Because today, to activate Workzone manually, we need to subscribe Cloud Identity Services because if don´t an error is showed. And SAP Build Apps Booster activate Workzone and Cloud Identity Services (custom IAS). And when we logon in Build using this custom IAS, the CF login inside BAS offers ask to chose between 2 identity provider to generate passcode. And both options show errors in inside create application generator in step to choose systems. In resume, looks like only default identity provider works inside BAS when selecting the systems.

entry.title: Integration of SAP Cloud ALM with on-premise SAP Business Suite systems without maintenance license
entry.content:
Hello,

We have been using SAP Cloud ALM for monitoring for our BTP services like SAP Build Work Zone, SAP Integration Suite etc. Now, we have our on-premise SAP Business Suite systems running without valid SAP maintenance license as the contract with SAP (for on-prem business suite systems) ended. Please let us know if we can use SAP Cloud ALM for monitoring of our on-premise SAP Business Suite systems.

Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Integration of SAP Cloud ALM with on-premise SAP Busi...
entry.content:
KBA 3609111 directs you to a list of all SAP Products/Cloud Services that are currently supported for integration with SAP Cloud ALM. If your on-premise SAP Product is on that list, it means that SAP Cloud ALM supports integration. The list will also contain information about the specific functionality available.

On-Premise systems + clients are integrated by running a program (/SDF/ALM_SETUP) to register the system + client with an SAP Cloud ALM tenant, included as part of the ST-PI component. The registration mechanisms do not check for a maintenance license or contract for the on-premise system being registered. The program will not prevent the registration based on these factors. As long as the ST-PI component can continue to be updated, and the product continues to exist in the list of SAP Cloud ALM integrations, the on-premise SAP Product without a maintenance license should work fine when integrated with SAP Cloud ALM. 

If the product can no longer be updated with the latest ST-PI component updates, or the product is removed from the the list of SAP Cloud ALM integrations, then it means it is no longer supported for integration with SAP Cloud ALM. At this point in time, the integration cannot be expected to function as it did while it was supported, and SAP will at that time no longer provide support for the integration.

entry.title: Re: Error in /DBE/MASSACTIONS in vss
entry.content:
Hi all,

I've found the solution. In this particular case, involving the transaction /DBE/MASSACTIONS and another related vehicle search, you need to add the authorization object /DBE/VMCAT and other auth objects that work together. 

  • /DBE/VEH -- Authorization Object for Vehicle
  • /DBE/VMCAT -- VSS Authorization for vehicle model catalog
  • C_AUTO_VMS -- Authorisation checks in VMS

Once you've added it manually, you can either adjust the value directly or maintain it via transaction SU24, setting the desired value and assigning the authorization object accordingly.

Finally, update the role and adjust the profile so it picks up the standard default value from SU24.

entry.title: AI Core: Internal server error when calling document grounding api
entry.content:
Hi community,

I am trying to create a collection in AI Core resource group where grounding is enabled. I have posted the following request, but received "Internal server error when calling document grounding api (status code: 500). 

If anyone knows how to resolve this issue, please let me know.

Reference: https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-ai-core/sap-ai-core-service-guide/create-collection

### Create Collection
POST {{baseUrl}}/v2/lm/document-grounding/vector/collections
Authorization: Bearer {{token_response.response.body.access_token}}
AI-Resource-Group: {{resourceGroupId}}

{
    "title": "test",
    "embeddingConfig": {
        "modelName": "text-embedding-ada-002"
    },
    "metadata": [
        { "key": "purpose", "value": ["demo"] },
        { "key": "project", "value": ["test"] }
    ]
}

entry.title: Re: Shift Factor Behavior When Only Early Completion Is D...
entry.content:
Hello @Ndah ,

If the shift factor is blank, then the system will consider it 0%. Test the shift factor in the quality server using various data combinations. Please document your expected results in MS Excel. Keep the maintenance cycle at 100 days. 100 days makes the calculation simple. 
Do not believe any 'source.' 🙂

Vaibhav

entry.title: Re: Super easy zooming of ITS Mobile screens
entry.content:
Small Buttons and Poor Usability of RF Transactions on Zebra Tablets

 

Do you know if the solution works here When using the standard SAP RF framework app (/SCWM/RFUI) accessed via ITS Mobile on Zebra tablets (which are handheld industrial devices), users experience very small buttons and UI elements on the screen. This results in a poor touch experience and difficulty in operation.

entry.title: I am also facing same error please help me how to resolve
Re: FIORI List Report Application shows data automaticall...
entry.content:
Hi there,

In your Manifest.json, look for this:

            "showGoButtonOnFilterBar"
Change it to false, in order to hide the button and start an automatic loading when you visit your website.

Set it to 'TRUE' in case you need the Go button

I applied on Analytical List Report, not sure if it works with List Reports or Other but I hope it works for you!
 
Each time you fill a filter and press "Enter" it runs the report applying the filter
Evidence:

entry.title: Talent Intelligence Hub - Workflow for Proficiency Level Changes of an Attribute in Growth Portfolio
entry.content:
As part of 1H2025 release, SAP SuccessFactors has released a new feature for Talent Intelligence Hub (TIH) which allows customers to have more control on Attribute's proficiency maintained by employees in their Growth Portfolio. This new feature now allows to configure workflows to approve the proficiency level changes for an attribute. This is the same workflow engine as used for Employee Central transactions and works in same principle.

So let's understand this feature in detail and see how it needs to be configured and how it works.

Step 1: Create a Workflow - In this blog I will take an example of 1-step approval with Reporting Manager, for detail information on creating a workflow, please click here

Following are few basic steps of creating a Workflow :

  • Go to Admin Center > Manage Organization, Pay and Job Structures and click on Create New Workflow 
  • Then below screen will come, where you should maintain the highlighted detail, while creating the workflow
  • There are few more steps, however they are optional and based on customer requirements those can be utilised as appropriate like Step 2 for 2nd level approval, Contributors and CC Role.
  • Lastly save the workflow and remember the name of the workflow.

Step 2: Creating a Business Rule - In this blog I will create a rule, such that whenever proficiency is changed for 'Skill' Attribute Type and which is Tagged as Core; then a workflow gets triggered. For detail information on creating a Rule, please click here.

Following are few basic steps of creating a Business Rule:

  • Go to Admin Center > Configure Business Rules
  • Click + to create a new rule.

     

  • Navigate to the Talent Intelligence Hub rule scenario category and select the Configure Workflow for Assigned Ratings in the Growth Portfolio scenario. 
  • Then below screen appears at right side of the screen, here specify the name and other details for the rule and choose Continue. 
  • Now in next screen configure a business rule for the scenario.
    • NOTE: Ensure that you obtain the external code for the required attribute type and tags from the Attributes Library before setting the criteria for the rule. 
    • Follow the steps as highlighted below to select Attribute Type > External Code

    •  Once selected then, set the Attribute Type > External Code as 'SKILL' 

       

    • Now add another 'AND' condition then, click on '+' sign beside 'and' then select the Tag as 'Core', follow nos. 1,2,3,4 for the steps

       

    • Now add the 'Then' condition then, follow the nos 1,2,3 to Set Workflow configuration and select the Workflow created in Step 1 and finally save the rule.

       

  • This is how the complete rule looks now, and when an employee modifies the proficiency level of an attribute of type SKILL which has the Core tag, a workflow is triggered and the designated reviewers of the workflow are notified of the approval request.

     

Step 3: Assigning the Rule to the Rule Configuration Object - Once the rule is configured and associated a workflow to the scenario, then associate the rule to the scenario.

  • Go to Admin Center > Manage Rule Assignments.
  • Select Rule Assignment and the Configure Workflow for Assigned Ratings in the Growth Portfolio scenario from the Search drop-down fields.
  • Choose Take Action > Make Correction and assign the rule from the Assigned Rules section.
  • Choose Save.

     

So let's test the Workflow set up for Proficiency Level Changes of an Attribute in Growth Portfolio:

  1. Go to Growth Portfolio of employee(Aanya Singh in this example), search for an attribute with Tag 'Core'

  2. Once the attribute of type SKILL is added, which is also having a Tag of Core; click on Edit Proficiency

  3. Then below screen appears which highlights that any proficiency change will trigger a workflow, as it has met our Business Rule condition of an employee modifying the proficiency level of an attribute of type SKILL which has the Core tag, hence a workflow will be triggered

  4. Now change the proficiency from Not Rated to 3 and click on Save; then a pop-up window will come to enter comments (optional) for reviewers and click on Submit.

  5. Once submitted, the workflow gets triggered and the attribute is locked and can't be modified. Now in the screen it shows Approval Request Submitted against the attribute name.

  6. After few seconds the Growth Portfolio UI will show the Skill as Approval Pending with a hyperlink, displayed next to the attribute. This link will help employee to see with whom the workflow is pending.

     

     

  7. Now approvers (Aanya's Reporting Manager Charles Braun) of the workflow will receive a request to approve the proficiency level changes for an attribute. Approvers can review the request and act on it.

  8. Login as Manager (Charles Braun) and go to the Home Page and Under the Approvals section, locate the approval request and act on the request. (one can approve multiple requests at same time)
  9. Also Manager can click on 'Change to proficiency level' link to go to the Workflow details page to see specific Attribute details and change in proficiency, and then they can either Approve, Delegate or Reject the request.

  10. Once Manager approves the request, proficiency change will be saved in the Employee's Growth Portfolio.

Key Points to note:

  • Configuration Requirement:
    • Growth Portfolio is enabled.
    • The workflow is configured.
  • Role Based Permission Prerequisite:
    • Role should have User Permissions > Growth Portfolio > Growth Portfolio > Edit permission.
  • Currently, the proficiency level approval status is displayed on the card and list views only.
  • When the request is approved, the attribute is updated with the new proficiency level.
  • When the request is rejected, the attribute displays the current proficiency level and becomes editable again.

Hope this feature will help customers to have an increased governance in changing the proficiency level for attributes.

Please let me know your feedback or inputs on this feature and what are the different workflow requirements on attributes proficiency level changes you may have!

entry.title: Re: 2025 Sapphire Selfies with Bluebeard
entry.content: Catching up with the SAP Apphaus partners. Great seeing my colleague Matheus Souza in person.

entry.title: Re: Profit Center Assignment in Customer/Supplier in SAP...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

To answer your first question, there is no proper application  to credit/debit customer or supplier in the G/L accounting.

The « Post General Journal Entries »  app currently does not support posting directly to Customer or Supplier subledger accounts. This is a limitation by design to separate G/L accounting from subledger postings.

However, if you want to post at the same time customer’s and supplier’s item in the same entry, you can either use the « Create Incoming Invoices » or « Create Outgoing Invoices » app and chosing the Complex posting option as shown below :

Regarding your second question, in SAP (including S/4HANA Cloud), you cannot manually enter a profit center on customer or supplier line items. These accounts are part of the subledger and aren’t considered cost-carrying, so the profit center field isn’t available for entry.

However, the profit center is usually assigned on the G/L line of the journal entry, either:

  • Manually, if the field is open for input,
  • Or automatically derived from a cost object like a cost center, internal order, or WBS element.

If your business needs the profit center for reporting, the best practice is to make sure the G/L line contains a cost object or rule that triggers the correct profit center.

 

I hope this will help find a solution to your problem.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Shift Factor Behavior When Only Early Completion Is D...
entry.content: Thank you very much! I appreciate it

entry.title: Re: SAP API Management using Entra and OAuth 2.0
entry.content: Hello, unfortunately I can't share the company's confidential documentation. Best to connect with your SAP Customer Partner team in your region and they will connect you to the Integration Suite professionals.

entry.title: Re: Fiori RAP: Define Sort Order for Value Help
entry.content: Can please elaborate your recommendation?

entry.title: Audit of Compensation plan template changes by proxy
entry.content:
Hi,

It was observed that if someone proxies with a different id and updates Compensation plan configuration, the plan templates show the proxy user id and not the original user who logged into the system. Is there a report or way to find out who was the original logged in user? @xavierlegarrec 

Thank you

Regards

Vinod

entry.title: Eliminate EC data freeze period during compensation planning
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to understand if someone has come across a situation to eliminate EC data change freeze during Compensation planning. 

Hi @xavierlegarrec please help with thoughts on leading practice recommendation with regards to EC data change freeze during Compensation planning and the duration of the data freeze.

Thank you

Regards

Vinod

entry.title: While posting from BAPI getting error of valuation type
entry.content:
Dear support team ,

i have a scenario where the same material against the same purchase orders i"m able to post from MIGO but not able to post from BAPI .

getting below error and also save BAPI in test directory for the reference. TEST CASE SAVE IN QUALITY SERVER

  BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE 

ERROR:   E M7 360 Material document data and PO data do not match (Valuation Type)

entry.title: How to open ObjectPage in edit mode in odata V4
entry.content:
I have implemented the same settings as following doc but it doesnt work, I am trying to open sap.fe.templates.ObjectPage.Component in edit while navigating from list page, anyone know nay setting iam missing?

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/topic/8665847a17a14e1abdcebe3e235c8c68

Appreciate the help!

entry.title: Re: 2025 Sapphire Selfies with Bluebeard
entry.content: I got lost and had these two trying to tell me where to go:

entry.title: Re: 2025 Sapphire Selfies with Bluebeard
entry.content: Some great community members here, Peter, Chris and Chris

entry.title: EC Employee History field mapping
entry.content:
Hi.

I'm trying to configure a varpay plan, but I'm having problems saving EC Employee History field mapping.

I map all the fields and Save. SF says that it was saved successfully. But when I come back to it, nothing has been saved.

I tried another plan and noticed that when I flag Use Employee Central for history data and bonus targets at Employee Central Settings, I receive following error: "Cannot read properties of null (reading 'internalCode')".

I didn't find any KBA about this error. Does anyone know what this is about and how can I fix it?

Thanks,

Isabella

entry.title: Re: 2025 Sapphire Selfies with Bluebeard
entry.content: Another great colleague from the #AppHaus network with Exed Consulting Renan Guides

entry.title: Re: How to add URL parameters to a function import call i...
entry.content:
Finally resolved the issue.

I removed the function import methods provided through the API manifest. I then added the same function imports using custom actions.

With this, I could add the URL parameters in the API call.

I just had to make all the relevant configuration in the Input fields.

Best Regards,

Rohit

entry.title: Re: How to open ObjectPage in edit mode in odata V4
entry.content: is your odata draft enabled?
